title: PASIAN MITE IN A MINTHANG SAK UN

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Van pan hong Ukpa, Hong hon zopa hi,
Ama gam minthang a, Jesuh hi, thei un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Pasian hong Honpa, Kumpi in mang den,
Mi khempeuh awng hen, Topa pahtawi hen;
phat in, Van mi’n tangko hi,
A lu uh kun suk in, Tuuno bia uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Va bia ni, ei’n zong Biak mah ding hi a,
Minthanna teng zong Ama a’ hita;
mite tawh kopin, Amah bia khawm ni,
Lungdam ko tawntungin, Amah it den ni.
